properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: As I look around me In these days we're living in I question, how much longer will it be Till our God, send the Message To the Bride, in this last age And we know now That our redemption is drawing nigh

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And only the redeemed Shall hear His voice on that day As he comes in clouds of glory To catch His bride away

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The graves will then burst open And the dead in Christ will rise And we which are alive in Jesus Will be changed in the twinkling of an eye

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Up to now, we've been waiting for the Bridegroom in His coming And the mystr'y of the Godhead shall be known And we knew now, in our spirit His returning is upon us With a shout and God's Trumpet we'll be gone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And we which are alive in Jesus Will be changed in the twinkling of an eye
